canonical_definition: A benchmark of 1,000 everyday activities in realistic simulation, cited to show that daily tasks often involve multiple objects.
papers: Architect: Generating Vivid and Interactive 3D Scenes with Hierarchical 2D Inpainting
MO-DDN: A Coarse-to-Fine Attribute-based Exploration Agent for Multi-Object Demand-driven Navigation
